MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Gary Rossi, appearing in Propria Persona. Order to Show Cause to Defendant in Propria Persona Gary Rossi for failure to appear at Erly Settlement Conference is heard this day. Court ordered OSC off calendar and dissolved/Judgment on file. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth, CSR# 5162. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-20-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Joseph L. Schatz, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Philip Fernandez, an individual, who was placed under oath and testified.
Gary Rossi, an individual, was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified. Mr. Rossi also appeared on behalf of Union Square Diamonds Incorporated, a California corporation doing business as Union Square Diamonds.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on July 10, 2008.
Doe Defendants 1-50, inclusive were dismissed without prejudice today, January 20, 2009.
Stipulation for Judgment was entered into between the parties, the terms of which are set for in said document filed January 20, 2008.

The Court voir dired both plaintiff and defendant as to the terms and their understanding of the agreement. Accordingly, it is hereby adjudged that plaintiff Philip Fernandez, an individual, shall recover from defendant Gary Rossi, an individual, and Union Square Diamonds Incorporated, a California corporation doing business as Union Square Diamonds, jointly and severally, the sum of $110,000.00. The Court retains jurisdiction to modify this Judgment in accordance with the terms of the aforesaid Stipulation.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
